description: Consolidated record for the alcoholic beverage list at this location, spanning beer-style items (IPA, Ale), Japanese plum wine, sake, sparkling shochu-based chu-hi cocktails, and Korean rice wine (makku).

likely_allergens.reason: Matcha IPA and Yuzu Ale are beer-style beverages typically brewed with barley and/or wheat malt; the remaining items in this consolidated group (sake, makku rice wine, chu-hi cocktails) are typically rice- or shochu-based with no comparable gluten evidence.
